mechanics.excerpt: EQUIPMENT changed centuries Rules for the treatment of injuries can be found in Healing; p. 123_ either draw powe by plugging into cockpit powcr jack use its internal battery; which works for Up to 48 hours_ The pack can dispense up to dozen doses of medications before needing replenishment, though these medications must replaced at least once month whether used Or not,. medipack will deliver dose of medication each time its wearer takes wound Or gets stunned.
